# OA主数据迁移步骤

### 未完成项


新主数据平台缺少”供应商地址ID”和”入账组织ID”
消费位置: 视源赔款审批流程,创建对公费用报销单或对公预付款单
处理方式: “新主数据平台增加以上字段” 还是 “用到的流程自己处理” ??


[图片1: null]

待财务域和主数据平台决策


### 1、基础脚本执行


```
-- EKP.DATA_FACTORY definition

CREATE TABLE "EKP"."DATA_FACTORY"
   (    "FACTORY_ID" VARCHAR2(64) NOT NULL ENABLE,
    "FACTORY_CODE" VARCHAR2(32),
    "FACTORY_NAME" VARCHAR2(128),
    "FACTORY_DESC" VARCHAR2(256),
    "FACTORY_GROUP" VARCHAR2(32),
    "ORG_ID" VARCHAR2(64),
    "LOCATION_ID" VARCHAR2(64),
    "DISABLE_DATE" DATE,
    "PRE_CAPACITY" NUMBER(10,0),
    "IS_OSP" VARCHAR2(1),
    "IS_ASN" VARCHAR2(1),
    "IS_TRANSFER" VARCHAR2(1),
    "ISSUED_LOCATION_ID" VARCHAR2(64),
    "PC_AUDITOR" VARCHAR2(64),
    "PE_AUDITOR" VARCHAR2(64),
    "QA_AUDITOR" VARCHAR2(64),
    "MC_FACTORY" VARCHAR2(64),
    "WAREHOUSE_TYPE" VARCHAR2(2),
    "LOGISTICS_CONTACT" VARCHAR2(128),
    "VENDOR_ID" VARCHAR2(64),
    "VENDOR_NAME" VARCHAR2(128),
    "EBS_FACTORY_ID" VARCHAR2(32),
    "EBS_VENDOR_ID" VARCHAR2(32),
    "EBS_ORG_ID" VARCHAR2(32),
    "EBS_ORGANIZATION_ID" VARCHAR2(32),
    "CRT_USER" VARCHAR2(64),
    "CRT_NAME" VARCHAR2(64),
    "CRT_TIME" DATE,
    "UPD_USER" VARCHAR2(64),
    "UPD_NAME" VARCHAR2(64),
    "UPD_TIME" DATE,
    "ORG_CODE" VARCHAR2(32),
    "ORG_NAME" VARCHAR2(128),
    "ISSUED_LOCATION_CODE" VARCHAR2(32),
    "LOCATION_NAME" VARCHAR2(256),
    "LOCATION_ADDRESS" VARCHAR2(512),
    "WAREHOUSENAME" VARCHAR2(64),
    "SOURCE_GOODS" VARCHAR2(32),
    "FD_ID" VARCHAR2(100),
    "INVALID_TIME" DATE,
     CONSTRAINT "PK_DATA_FACTORY" PRIMARY KEY ("FACTORY_ID")
  USING INDEX PCTFREE 10 INITRANS 2 MAXTRANS 255
  STORAGE(INITIAL 65536 NEXT 1048576 MINEXTENTS 1 MAXEXTENTS 2147483645
  PCTINCREASE 0 FREELISTS 1 FREELIST GROUPS 1
  BUFFER_POOL DEFAULT FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT CELL_FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT)
  TABLESPACE "EKP"  ENABLE
   ) SEGMENT CREATION IMMEDIATE
  PCTFREE 10 PCTUSED 40 INITRANS 1 MAXTRANS 255
 NOCOMPRESS LOGGING
  STORAGE(INITIAL 65536 NEXT 1048576 MINEXTENTS 1 MAXEXTENTS 2147483645
  PCTINCREASE 0 FREELISTS 1 FREELIST GROUPS 1
  BUFFER_POOL DEFAULT FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT CELL_FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT)
  TABLESPACE "EKP" ;

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "EKP"."PK_DATA_FACTORY" ON "EKP"."DATA_FACTORY" ("FACTORY_ID")
  PCTFREE 10 INITRANS 2 MAXTRANS 255
  STORAGE(INITIAL 65536 NEXT 1048576 MINEXTENTS 1 MAXEXTENTS 2147483645
  PCTINCREASE 0 FREELISTS 1 FREELIST GROUPS 1
  BUFFER_POOL DEFAULT FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT CELL_FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT)
  TABLESPACE "EKP" ;
```


### 2、代码合并


### 3、应用停止


### 4、同义词表切换到新视图


#### 工厂数据


```
-- DROP SYNONYM DATA_PROJECT_V;
RENAME DATA_PROJECT_V TO DATA_PROJECT_V_BAK0512;
-- 创建工厂项目信息视图（视图名：DATA_PROJECT_V）
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW DATA_PROJECT_V (
    PROJECT_NUMBER,    -- 项目编号（原工厂编码factory_code）
    FACTORY_NAME,      -- 工厂名称（原factory_name）
    ADDRESS,           -- 工厂地址（原LOCATION_ADDRESS）
    INVALID_TIME       -- 失效时间（原INVALID_TIME）
) AS
SELECT
    df.factory_code AS PROJECT_NUMBER,
    df.factory_name AS FACTORY_NAME,
    df.LOCATION_ADDRESS AS ADDRESS,
    df.INVALID_TIME
FROM DATA_FACTORY df;
```


#### 客户主数据


```
--DROP SYNONYM DC_CUST_ACCOUNTS_V;
RENAME DC_CUST_ACCOUNTS_V TO DC_CUST_ACCOUNTS_V_BAK0512;
CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE EDITIONABLE VIEW "EKP"."DC_CUST_ACCOUNTS_V" ("CUST_NAME", "CUST_ACCOUNT_NUMBER", "CUST_ACCOUNT_ID", "KNOWN_AS") AS
  SELECT mcbi.cus_name
     , mcbi.ebs_cus_code
     , mcbi.cust_account_id
     , mcbi.cus_abbr
  FROM md_cus_base_info mcbi
 WHERE mcbi.cust_account_id IS NOT NULL;
```


#### 供应商数据


```
--DROP SYNONYM DC_SUPPLIERS_V;
RENAME DC_SUPPLIERS_V TO DC_SUPPLIERS_V_BAK0512;

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE EDITIONABLE VIEW "EKP"."DC_SUPPLIERS_V" ("VENDOR_NAME", "VENDOR_CODE", "EMPLOYEE_NUMBER", "VENDOR_TYPE", "BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME", "BRANCH_BANK_NAME", "VENDOR_ID", "VENDOR_STATUS", "BANK_NAME", "BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM", "BANK_CURRENCY_CODE") AS
  SELECT mv.vendor_name
,TO_NUMBER(
        CASE
            WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(mv.vendor_code, '^[0-9]+$')
            THEN mv.vendor_code
            ELSE NULL
        END
    ) AS vendor_code
     , mv.employee_number
     , mv.vendor_type
     , mvb.bank_account_name
     , mvb.branch_bank_name
     ,mv.erp_vendor_id AS vendor_id
     ,'Y' AS vendor_status
     ,mvb.BANK_NAME AS bank_name
     ,mvb.BANK_ACCOUNT AS bank_account_num
     ,mvb.bank_currency_code
  FROM md_vendor_info mv
  LEFT JOIN md_vendor_bank_info mvb
    ON mvb.vendor_id = mv.vendor_id;

```


### 5、应用启动
